one_time_description: Government assistance funding from CIRNAC for COVID-19 relief
economic_notes: Band has no land base. Member of BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership receiving 7% of net provincial gaming revenues over 25 years. Band is pursuing land claims against Government of Canada with total CIBC loan balance of $3,174,389 covered by insurance arrangement.
notes: Very small band with only 12 members and no land base (Qayqayt First Nation). No balance sheet provided in the extracted text but financial instruments note confirms cash $648,400, accrued interest receivable $1,747, accounts payable $9,500. Deferred contributions of $532,412 include BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP ($483,584), Ministry of Children and Family Development ($30,000), and CIRNAC Specific Claims ($18,828). Large contingent liability of $3,174,389 (CIBC loan for land claims legal fees) NOT recorded on balance sheet due to insurance arrangement covering repayment. OSR is interest income only ($308). All CIRNAC funding classified as government transfers including COVID-19 support. Prior year accumulated surplus per opening balance is $44,585 but statement shows $44,584 as closing 2020 — minor rounding discrepancy in source document.
